title: Opening for Software Engineer at Ninjacart

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Ninjacart
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
